text.title: Code Coverage Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping stack + repo state to a coverage-gate configuration choice. Leaves reference rules from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the primary language stack (detected by lockfile)?

conclusion.verdict: branch=true, global 80, diff 90, per_dir from critical-path manifest

branch.question: Which runner is in use (Jest / Vitest / Node native)?

conclusion.verdict: coverageProvider='v8'; thresholds object with global + per-dir
c8 wrapper; emit lcov; thresholds enforced by external diff-cover
cargo llvm-cov; lcov export; diff-cover against main
per-language sub-configs merged via diff-cover combine

text.example: stack=python → q-py-legacy: legacy=true → diff-cover-only mode (ref diff-cover-on-pr). No global threshold added; PRs only need diff-coverage to be ≥90% on changed lines.
